title: scabiosa pyrenaica subsp. candicans
intro: Scabiosa pyrenaica subsp. candicans, also known as the Pyrenean scabious or white scabious, is a biennial or perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Scabiosa pyrenaica subsp. candicans include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
